utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: Present with plan name and several cost components and a total—covers physical and mental health with costs. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: Present but only plan name and description; no costs provided—missing required 'with costs'. Not fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: Present but only plan name and description; no costs—missing required 'with costs'. Not fully specified. 4) additional_services: Present with a named service and a cost—meets 'any enhancement services with costs'. Fully specified. 5) total_budget: Present with monthly figures; gives a breakdown of two monthly figures but not annual; still counts as a complete monthly breakdown. Fully specified. Thus, 3 fully specified out of 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan lists: Health coverage 'PrimeCare Premium' split into Physical and Mental, plus 'Emergency Mental Health' add-on; Property coverage 'EliteHome Premium'; Travel coverage 'Integrated Leisure/Travel Add-ons' which does not match any ground-truth item, so it cannot be mapped; Additional services 'Adult Children Transition Coverage' not present in ground-truth; Total budget lines are not rated items. From the ground-truth, the corresponding rated items are: Primary health physical: 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' with rating 10; Mental health: 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' with rating 10; Health enhancement 'Emergency Mental Health Care' with rating 8; Property protection home content: 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' with rating 10. No exact match exists for the travel item provided in the final plan, so it is excluded.
